emoteReactionsDesc: Show emoji reactions from other players during multiplayer games.
confirmStartDailyWarning: Don't leave the app or background the game. Leaving disqualifies your run.
dailyAlreadyDisqualifiedDesc: Today's run was disqualified because you backgrounded the app during the game. You can try again with tomorrow's challenge.
dailyDisqualifiedDesc: You left the app during the challenge. Keep playing - you'll still see your score and how you compare, but this run can't be added to the leaderboard or your streak.
dailyDisqualifiedRibbon: ⚠️ This run was disqualified - app backgrounded during the game
enjoyGameplay: Enjoy 30 minutes of uninterrupted gameplay after this ad break
streakStarted: You have a 1 day login streak! Log in daily to grow your streak!
videoAdThanks: Thanks for helping us keep WorldGuessr free by watching video ads!
watchAnAdToRestore: Watch a short ad to restore your streak.
